flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Rider University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.9k → $41.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Rider University rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.9k → $41.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Rider University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).
